title: Medieval Kings and Castles
description: Rule your world! This mod adds epic castles, formidable knights, and powerful kings, all guarding valuable loot to enrich your adventures.
body: Step into a definitive medieval experience! This mod drastically overhauls your world, immersing you in a high-stakes realm of sprawling fortresses, chivalric combat, and untold treasures. Prepare to embark on an epic journey where only the bravest adventurers can challenge the crown and claim their spoils.
